---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

# Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

# Load Data

```{r}
policlim_raw <- read_csv(here("data/raw/policlim_full_qs_2025-17-06.csv"))
```

# Data Preparation

```{r}
policlim_prepared <- policlim_raw |> 
    filter(climate == 1, ) |> 
    select(qs_id, original_text)
```

# Summary Statistics

```{r}
summary(policlim_prepared)
glimpse(policlim_prepared)
```

# Data Export

```{r}
write_csv(policlim_prepared, here("data/prep/policlim_climate_for_topic_modeling.csv"))
```
